<?php declare(strict_types = 1); namespace PHPStan\PhpDocParser\Ast\NodeVisitor; use PHPStan\PhpDocParser\Ast\AbstractNodeVisitor; use PHPStan\PhpDocParser\Ast\Attribute; use PHPStan\PhpDocParser\Ast\Node; final class CloningVisitor extends AbstractNodeVisitor { public function enterNode(Node $originalNode): Node { $node = clone $originalNode; $node->setAttribute(Attribute::ORIGINAL_NODE, $originalNode); return $node; } }
